[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] '''Nash Llalik''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] who lived in [[Plavin 6]] with his family.<ref name="AIR" />

Llalik's family included his wife, Dr. [[Loran Llalik]] and three children: a [[Unidentified Llalik child|son (the eldest child)]], Dr. [[Nashiak Llalik]], and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent [[Saren Llalik]].<ref name="AIR" />
